description.ko: ECHO-0는 복잡한 음파를 몰입형 3D 기하학적 패턴으로 변환하여 음향 진동과 디지털 건축 사이의 공생 관계를 탐구하는 실험적인 시청각 시스템입니다.
description.en: ECHO-0 is an experimental audiovisual system that transforms complex sound waves into immersive 3D geometric patterns, exploring the symbiosis between acoustic vibration and digital architecture.

prompt: Macro shot of abstract sound wave visualization, glowing neon crystalline structures reacting to deep bass, translucent geometric shards suspended in a dark void, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, ethereal atmosphere, cybernetic aesthetic.
